title: RIO Delegation Boundary — Constrained Delegation + Gateway Identity Evaluation
description: Extracted from constrainedDelegation.ts (checkDelegation, classifyRoleSeparation, validateRoleTransition) and gatewayProxy.ts (evaluateIdentityAtGatewayBoundary, resolveAuthorityModel, GatewayIdentityEvaluation).

DelegationCheck.description: constrainedDelegation.ts — Result of checkDelegation(). Three outcomes based on identity comparison and cooldown.

proposerIdentity.description: The identity (principalId or userId) that proposed the intent.

approverIdentity.description: The identity (principalId or userId) attempting to approve.

intentCreatedAt.description: Timestamp when the intent was created (ms since epoch).

approvalAttemptedAt.description: Timestamp when approval is attempted (defaults to Date.now()).

GatewayIdentityEvaluation.description: gatewayProxy.ts — Gateway-level identity evaluation. Rule 3 enforcement: IF proposer_identity_id == approver_identity_id, THEN the transaction is INVALID unless the Self-Authorization sub-policy is met.

proposer_identity_id.description: Explicit proposer identity ID for the receipt.

approver_identity_id.description: Explicit approver identity ID for the receipt.

authority_model.description: Canonical audit trail label. Appears in receipts, ledger entries, and governance reports.

RoleTransitionCheck.description: constrainedDelegation.ts validateRoleTransition(). Proposer role cannot directly invoke approver actions without explicit role switch.

RootAuthority.description: authorityLayer.ts — Root authority record. Ed25519 key pair holder.

SignedPolicy.description: authorityLayer.ts — Signed governance policy. Deterministic hash. Activation/supersession/revocation lifecycle.

policy_hash.description: SHA-256(canonical_json(rules)). Deterministic — same rules always produce same hash.

signed_by.description: Authority ID that signed this policy.

DELEGATION_COOLDOWN_MS.description: constrainedDelegation.ts. Minimum cooldown in milliseconds before same-identity approval is allowed. 2 minutes.

case_2_same_identity_cooldown_elapsed.description: Same identity but cooldown satisfied. Constrained delegation approved.

case_3_same_identity_cooldown_not_elapse.description: BLOCKED. No immediate self-approval. Must wait for cooldown.

gateway_evaluation_required.description: gatewayProxy.ts. evaluateIdentityAtGatewayBoundary() MUST be called before any Gateway /authorize call. It is the single source of truth for identity verification at the Gateway evaluation level.

role_permissions.description: constrainedDelegation.ts. proposer role can only create_intent. approver role can only authorize_action. Cross-role actions require explicit role switch.

ledger_identity_fields.description: gateway-identity-eval.test.ts. DELEGATION_BLOCKED, DELEGATION_APPROVED, and EXECUTION ledger entries MUST include proposer_identity_id, approver_identity_id, and authority_model.

boundary_semantics.description: gateway-identity-eval.test.ts. At cooldown - 1ms: BLOCKED. At exactly cooldown elapsed: ALLOWED (constrained). Boundary is inclusive.

one_is_untrusted_client.description: gatewayProxy.ts. Per Decision 2: ONE is an untrusted client. It NEVER sends raw principal IDs. The Gateway resolves email to principal via resolvePrincipalByEmail(). ONE only bridges identity via email.

policy_hash_determinism.description: authorityLayer.ts. Same rules always produce the same policy_hash. SHA-256(canonical_json(rules)).

policy_lifecycle.description: authorityLayer.ts. Policies go through: active → superseded (when a new policy is activated) or active → revoked. Only one policy can be active at a time.

failure_conditions.self_authorization_blocked: Same identity attempts approval before cooldown → BLOCKED. authority_model = 'BLOCKED — Self-Authorization Sub-Policy Not Met'.
failure_conditions.role_transition_denied: Proposer role attempts authorize_action → denied. Must explicitly switch to approver role.
failure_conditions.revoked_authority: Root authority with status 'revoked' cannot sign policies or issue tokens.
failure_conditions.no_active_policy: Authorization token cannot be issued if no active policy exists.

authority_boundary_rule.rule: Execution requires a locally issued authorization. Upstream receipts may be consumed but never grant permission.
authority_boundary_rule.applies_to: The delegation check is a receipt of identity evaluation. It does not authorize execution. A separate authorization must be issued after the delegation check passes.
